name: Spyro Reignited Trilogy
post_apply_message: Spyro Reignited — 6 intro Bumpers renamed to .gfm-orig (ATVI, Toys for Bob, Unreal — Standard + Gamma pair for each). Boot straight to menu next launch. Reversible.
notes: Intro skip only. UE4 game, internal name 'Falcon' (Toys for Bob's codename). Filenames from PCGW. The 6 files are 3 logos × 2 variants (base + Gamma-corrected). If your monitor/Deck uses one variant, removing both is fine — the game falls through to menu.
